About

Urta Mirena

Fashion Management; Branding, Strategy & Creative Direction

I'm a Fashion Management graduate from Istituto Marangoni, living in Milan since 2022.

Milan is my material. The person crossing the street, the way their dog is somehow also perfectly styled, the old bars where Italian authenticity thrives, the store windows, the chaos of a Tuesday morning, the nightlife, the food; all of it feeds into how I think and what I make. There is something about this city that is impossible to explain to someone who hasn't lived it. It gets under your skin. It raises your standards. It makes you look twice at everything.

I moved here for the degree, but I stayed by choice. After graduating I made a deliberate decision to remain, because Milan is where I want to build something; and I believe the best way to understand the industry is to be inside it, every day, in the city where it lives and breathes.

My approach sits at the intersection of business and creativity. Fashion Management gave me the strategic foundation; brand thinking, market logic, retail, communication; but what drives me is the visual and the conceptual. I am most alive when those two things are working together.

I recently launched Gaia Archival, a vintage designer shoe business where the sourcing, branding and creative vision are entirely my own, developed in collaboration with a close creative partner. It is one of many projects I am building towards, using the city and everything it offers as tools to materialise and further develop my creative vision.
